name: TC4 jar/tube exact transfer edge-case parity
implemented: EssentiaJarBlockEntity now has addToContainerOriginal and takeFromContainerOriginal adapters using original return semantics.
Void jar overflow now consumes excess essentia while storing only up to 64, matching TileJarFillableVoid.addToContainer.
Normal jar suction stops at full; void jar keeps baseline suction, and labelled void jar uses 48 while normal labelled jar uses 64.
Phial pour/take interactions now use the same original jar add/take helpers as tube transfer.
Tube transfer destination lookup uses jar.originalSuctionAmount instead of a generic fixed resolver table.
TileTubeOneway directional behavior is now split into allowsInputFrom, allowsOutputTo and allowsNetworkTraversal adapters.
Tube source/destination scans now respect one-way input/output direction gates and subtype aspect filters.
pack.mcmeta/resource-pack metadata fix from Stage198/200 remains preserved.
forge_1192_adapters: Forge block-entity ticks route TileJarFillable.fillJar edge cases through tube transfer snapshots rather than direct IEssentiaTransport calls.
Direction/facing adapters replace ForgeDirection ordinal side usage.
drift_notes: Exact CodeChicken RayTracer subHit cuboid selection for tubes is still represented by BlockHitResult direction until final renderer/shape pass.
